body_text: retrieve all the comments in Andrej Karpathy's LLM Wiki concept document here: https://gist.github.com/karpathy/442a6bf555914893e9891c11519de94f and then find all github urls. and get the most trending github repos implementing newly or on top of their base project. Artifacts saved. And it's free." | | 2 | 819★ | [Houseofmvps/codesight](https://github.com/Houseofmvps/codesight) | TS | Universal AI context generato

turns.text: retrieve all the comments in Andrej Karpathy's LLM Wiki concept document here: https://gist.github.com/karpathy/442a6bf555914893e9891c11519de94f and then find all github urls. and get the most trending github repos implementing newly or on top of their base project.

turns.name: mcp__plugin_context-mode_context-mode__ctx_execute
turns.text:
{"code": "set -e
mkdir -p /tmp/llmwiki
cd /tmp/llmwiki
for p in 1 2 3 4 5; do
  curl -sS "https://api.github.com/gists/442a6bf555914893e9891c11519de94f/comments?per_page=100&page=$p" -o c$p.json
  n=$(python3 -c "import json;print(len(json.load(open('c$p.json'))))")
  echo "page $p count $n"
  [ "$n" = "0" ] && break
done
python3 <<'PY'
import json, re, glob, collections
all_comments=[]
for f in sorted(glob.glob('c*.json')):
    try: all_comments += json.load(open(f))
    except: pass
print("TOTAL_COMMENTS", len(all_comments))
urls=[]
rx=re.compile(r'https?://github\.com/[^\s\)\]\>\"\'`,]+', re.I)
for c in all_comments:
    for u in rx.findall(c.get('body','') or ''):
        u=u.rstrip('.,;:)')
        urls.append((c['user']['login'], u))
print("URL_COUNT", len(urls))
# dedupe repo roots
repos=set()
rxrepo=re.compile(r'github\.com/([^/]+)/([^/#?]+)', re.I)
for _,u in urls:
    m=rxrepo.search(u)
    if m:
        owner,repo=m.group(1),m.group(2)
        if owner.lower() in ('karpathy',) and repo.startswith('442a6bf'): continue
        if owner.lower() in ('orgs','topics','features','about','pricing','login','sponsors','marketpl…

turns.name: mcp__plugin_context-mode_context-mode__ctx_execute
turns.text:
{"code": "cd /tmp/llmwiki
which gh && gh auth status 2>&1 | head -5
python3 <<'PY'
import json
meta=json.load(open('meta.json'))
have={r['full'] for r in meta}
repos=json.load(open('repos.json'))
skip={'notifications/unsubscribe-auth','your-org/llm-wiki.git','ESJavadex/knowledge-forge.git','swarmclawai/swarmvault**','us/crw'}
missing=[]
for o,r in repos:
    r=r.rstrip('*').rstrip('.git')
    full=f"{o}/{r}"
    if full in skip or full in have: continue
    missing.append(full)
json.dump(missing, open('missing.json','w'))
print("MISSING", len(missing))
PY
", "intent": "check gh cli", "language": "shell"}

turns.text: {"command": "mkdir -p /Users/neo/Developer/Projects/LLM-Wiki/data && cp /tmp/llmwiki/all.json /Users/neo/Developer/Projects/LLM-Wiki/data/comments.json && cp /tmp/llmwiki/meta.json /Users/neo/Developer/Projects/LLM-Wiki/data/repos_meta.json && ls /Users/neo/Developer/Projects/LLM-Wiki/data/", "description": "Save artifacts to project data dir"}

Artifacts saved. Here is the summary.

## Actions
- Fetched all **400 comments** on Karpathy's LLM Wiki gist (4 pages, GitHub API)
- Extracted **134 unique GitHub repos** referenced in comment bodies; enriched each with stars/forks/created date via `gh api`
- Ranked by stars, filtered to repos **created on/after the gist date (2026-04-04)** = "newly built on top"

## Files
- `data/comments.json` — all 400 raw comments
- `data/repos_meta.json` — 132 repos with metadata (stars, forks, created, desc, lang)

## Top trending repos built on Karpathy's LLM Wiki (created ≥ 2026-04-04)

| # | Stars | Repo | Lang | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | **41,314★** | [milla-jovovich/mempalace](https://github.com/milla-jovovich/mempalace) | Python | "Highest-scoring AI memory system ever benchmarked. And it's free." |
| 2 | 819★ | [Houseofmvps/codesight](https://github.com/Houseofmvps/codesight) | TS | Universal AI context generator for Claude/Cursor/Copilot |
| 3 | 468★ | [AgriciDaniel/claude-obsidian](https://github.com/AgriciDaniel/claude-obsidian) | Shell | Claude + Obsidian compounding wiki vault |
| 4 | 358★ | [xoai/sage-wiki](https://github.com/xoai/sage-wiki) | Go | LLM-compiled personal KB (papers/articles → wiki) |
| 5 | 347★ | [atomicmemory/llm-wiki-compiler](https://github.com/atomicmemory/llm-wiki-compiler) | TS | Raw sources in, interlinked wiki out |
| 6 | 289★ | [Ar9av/obsidian-wiki](https://github.com/Ar9av/obsidian-wiki) | Python | Agent framework for Obsidian wiki maintenance |
| 7 | 231★ | [Astro-Han/karpathy-llm-wiki](https://github.com/Astro-Han/karpathy-llm-wiki) | — | One skill to build a Karpathy-style LLM wiki |
| 8 | 138★ | [swarmclawai/swarmvault](https://github.com/swarmclawai/swarmvault) | TS | Local-first LLM KB compiler (Claude/Codex/OpenCode) |
| 9 | 79★ | [Ss1024sS/LLM-wiki](https://github.com/Ss1024sS/LLM-wiki) | Python | Direct implementation of the gist |
| 10 | 57★ | [Pratiyush/llm-wiki](https://github.com/Pratiyush/llm-wiki) | Python | KB from Claude/Codex/Cursor/Gemini sessions |

**Key finding:** `milla-jovovich/mempalace` is the clear breakout at 41k★ in one week. The next tier (~300–800★) clusters around Obsidian-integrated compilers (`claude-obsidian`, `sage-wiki`, `llm-wiki-compiler`, `obsidian-wiki`), which appears to be the dominant implementation pattern the community is converging on. 64 of the 132 indexed repos were…
